laws.title: Massachusetts Minimum Wage — $15.00/hr
laws.summary: Massachusetts' minimum wage is $15.00 per hour, effective January 1, 2023 — no further scheduled increases are currently mandated by state law. Tipped employees must receive at least $6.75/hour from the employer, with tips required to bring the total to at least $15.00/hour.
compliance_actions: Pay all non-exempt employees at least $15.00/hour
For tipped employees, pay at least $6.75/hour and ensure tips bring total to at least $15.00/hour
Post the current Massachusetts Minimum Wage Notice in a visible workplace location
Monitor for future legislative changes to the scheduled wage rate
laws.source: Massachusetts Executive Office of Labor and Workforce Development
